metadata.title: Seedance 2.0 - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Seedance 2.0 by ByteDance. Multimodal AI video model that generates consistent, cinematic videos with strong multi-shot consistency and native audio. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video.

hero.title: Seedance 2.0
hero.description: ByteDance's multimodal AI video model. Generate consistent, cinematic videos with strong multi-shot consistency and native audio using text, image, video, and audio references.

introduce.title: About Seedance 2.0
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's latest multimodal AI video generation model. It excels at creating cinematic videos with strong multi-shot consistency and native audio synchronization, supporting multiple input modalities including text, images, video, and audio references.

items.title: Multimodal Input
items.description: Supports text, image, video, and audio references for versatile video generation workflows.

items.title: Multi-Shot Consistency
items.description: Strong consistency across multiple shots for cohesive visual storytelling.

items.title: Native Audio
items.description: Generate videos with synchronized speech, ambient sound, and background music.

items.title: Cinematic Quality
items.description: Professional-grade cinematic visuals with advanced camera control.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Seedance 2.0 a leading AI video generation model.

items.title: Text To Video
items.description: Generate stunning videos from text descriptions with cinematic quality.

items.title: Image To Video
items.description: Transform static images into dynamic video content with natural motion.

items.title: Video To Video
items.description: Edit and transform existing videos with AI-powered enhancement.

items.title: Audio Reference
items.description: Use audio references to guide video generation with synchronized sound.

items.title: 1080p HD Output
items.description: High-resolution video output up to 1080p with exceptional detail.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Seedance 2.0.

items.description: Create engaging marketing content with cinematic quality and native audio.

items.description: Generate viral-ready content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

items.title: What is Seedance 2.0?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's multimodal AI video generation model that creates cinematic videos with strong multi-shot consistency and native audio using text, image, video, and audio references.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and Video To Video (V2V) generation modes, along with audio reference capabilities.

items.title: Who created Seedance 2.0?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 is created by ByteDance, the company behind TikTok and other popular video platforms.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 excels at multi-shot consistency, native audio generation, and multimodal input support, making it ideal for professional video production.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Seedance 2.0 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What video quality can I expect?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 generates high-resolution videos up to 1080p with cinematic quality and professional-grade visuals.

cta.title: Ready to Try Seedance 2.0?
cta.description: Experience ByteDance's multimodal AI video generation. Create cinematic videos with native audio.
